description.ko: 이끼 낀 막과 혈관 시스템이 리드미컬하고 무중력인 공간에서 맥동하며, 빛을 통해 호흡하는 유기적 생명체를 표현합니다.
description.en: A representation of organic life breathing through light, where mossy membranes and vascular systems pulse in a rhythmic, weightless void.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Thalamic Grove of Bioluminescence.' A complex network of #2D5A3D deep forest vascular structures and #7FB069 translucent moss-like membranes weaving into a central pulsing heart. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent mist, exhaling rhythmic ripples of #FFE66D golden liquid light that flow like silk. Macro focus on the cellular semi-permeable textures, fluid dynamics, Octane render, 8k, volumetric light shafts, capturing a divine organic flow and serene breathing atmosphere.
